symptom_description: Annual boiler safety valve pop test failed: valve stuck closed during lever lifting test (`330 in-lbs` pull) or opened `17.4 PSI` above stamped ASME set pressure.
root_cause: Oversized safety valve for the current boiler load causing rapid cycling/chattering (`50 Hz cycles/min`) and seat damage.
action_taken: Replaced damaged valve with correctly sized ASME relief valve (`P/N 3856-B`), secured vent piping with spring hangers, and verified smooth lift and reseat.
parts_used: Reduced Capacity ASME Valve, Spring Pipe Hangers, Drip Pan

symptom_description: Relief valve popped off prematurely at `63` PSI during normal operation (`nameplate setpoint 150 PSI`). Valve fails to reseat tightly after blowing down.
root_cause: Corrosion, scale, and boiler alkalinity carryover particles (`0.11 inch` debris) lodged between safety valve disc and stainless steel nozzle seat after previous simmer event.
action_taken: Isolated boiler, removed leaking safety relief valve, installed certified code-stamped replacement ASME safety relief valve (`Spec-557`) set at 150 PSI, and verified zero leakage under full operating pressure.
parts_used: ASME Section I Code-Stamped Safety Relief Valve (1.5x2.5 inch, 150 PSI), Spiral Wound Flange Gasket 1.5-inch, High-Temp Stud Bolt Set

symptom_description: Fuel consumption increased by `37%%` per ton of steam generated (`extreme` efficiency drop). Low water cutoff float chamber fouled with sludge accumulation.
root_cause: Condensate return contaminated with process calcium (`63 ppm ppm hardness`) from a leaking heat exchanger.
action_taken: Located and repaired leaking process heat exchanger (`Spec-111`), acid washed boiler waterside (`53 lbs gal` acid), and re-passivated metal surfaces.
parts_used: Process Heat Exchanger Tube Bundle, Muriatic Acid (55 Gal), Passivation Chemical

symptom_description: Conductivity of boiler water unexpectedly low (`0.59 Mega-ohms uS/cm`) despite high chemical feed, indicating massive dilution from makeup water.
root_cause: Stress corrosion cracking (`SCC`) near the tubesheet weld due to excessive residual rolling stresses (`155 ft-lbs`) and high causticity (`pH 8.8`).
action_taken: Stress-relieved tubesheet welds using ceramic heating pads (`86°C`), adjusted blowdown rate to control alkalinity (`pH 5.5`), and replaced SCC-damaged tubes (`P/N 3286-B`).
parts_used: SA-210 Medium Carbon Tubes, Ceramic Heating Pads (Rental), Alkalinity Test Kit

symptom_description: Loud excessive hissing and steam escaping sound (`high-pitched squealing`) audible inside furnace firebox when burner cycles off. White steam blowing out of stack.
root_cause: Stress corrosion cracking (`SCC`) near the tubesheet weld due to excessive residual rolling stresses (`349 in-lbs`) and high causticity (`pH 9.4`).
action_taken: Stress-relieved tubesheet welds using ceramic heating pads (`86°C`), adjusted blowdown rate to control alkalinity (`pH 5.6`), and replaced SCC-damaged tubes (`P/N 5679-C`).
parts_used: SA-210 Medium Carbon Tubes, Ceramic Heating Pads (Rental), Alkalinity Test Kit

symptom_description: Intermittent flame failure lockouts during high-to-low fire modulation transitions. Tech observed abnormal yellow, smoky flame instead of tight blue pattern.
root_cause: Gas pressure regulator diaphragm drift (`-11.2 PSI`) caused improper air-to-fuel ratio (`excessively rich mixture`) leading to flame instability and high CO.
action_taken: Replaced defective UV flame scanner head and ignition electrode assembly (`Spec-779`), tightened and recalibrated air/fuel modulating linkage arms (`Spec-565`), and set combustion profile using digital flue gas analyzer.
parts_used: Modulating Servo Actuator Motor, Gas Solenoid Valve Coil 120V, Burner Diffuser Gasket

symptom_description: Visual inspection shows `44%%` of tube passes bridged solid with scale. Acid clean required.
root_cause: Lack of daily bottom blowdown execution by plant operators allowed suspended solids (`417 ppm ppm TDS`) and sludge to bake onto hot tubesheet surfaces.
action_taken: Circulated inhibited sulfamic acid descaling solution (`Spec-931`) through boiler waterside loop for `18767` hours, neutralized and flushed until pH neutral, inspected tubes (`scale completely cleared`), and renewed handhole gaskets.
parts_used: Water Softener Cation Resin (5 Bags), Boiler Handhole Gaskets (Top & Bottom Set), Internal Scale Treatment Chemical (15 Gal)

symptom_description: Acoustic tube leak detection alarm triggered (`44 Hz Hz` signature). Boiler pressure dropping `25.5` PSI below setpoint despite burner firing at high fire.
root_cause: Localized waterside oxygen pitting corrosion (`0.25 inch` deep) inside fire tubes due to intermittent failure of boiler feedwater deaerator (`125°C` operation) / oxygen scavenger chemical dosing.
action_taken: Isolated and cooled down boiler, opened front and rear doors, identified 3 leaking fire tubes using hydrostatic test (`37 PSI`), reamed out and cut out failed tubes, rolled and beaded in new seamless steel boiler tubes (`Spec-624`), and hydro-tested to 150 PSI.
parts_used: Seamless Steel Boiler Tubes 2.5-inch OD (Bundle of 4), Refractory Door Rope Gasket Kit, Tubesheet Ferrules

symptom_description: Loud high hissing and steam escaping sound (`chattering`) audible inside furnace firebox when burner cycles off. White steam blowing out of stack.
root_cause: Waterside scale accumulation (`> 0.12 inch thick`) caused localized insulating effect, leading to tube metal overheating (`108°C`) and stress rupture.
action_taken: Cut out cracked fire tubes, ground out and re-welded/rolled tube-to-tubesheet joints on adjacent tubes, replaced door gaskets, and adjusted deaerator operating temperature to `105°C` (`95°C`).
parts_used: Boiler Tube Plug Kit, Refractory Cement Patch (50 lb Bag), Door Sealing Gasket

symptom_description: Flue gas oxygen (`O2`) levels abnormally low (`< 14%%`) due to steam displacement. Boiler struggling to maintain `45 PSI` header pressure.
root_cause: Fireside acid dew-point corrosion on outer tube walls caused by burning sulfur-bearing fuel during low-load/low-temperature operation (`< 111°C` stack temp).
action_taken: Opened fireside doors, plugged 2 leaking tubes using certified tapered steel boiler tube plugs (`Spec-991`) as temporary repair, calibrated oxygen scavenger chemical dosing pump, and scheduled full retubing during summer outage.
parts_used: Tapered Steel Boiler Tube Plugs (Set of 4), High-Temperature Door Gasket Rope, Oxygen Scavenger Chemical (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Boiler stack temperature steadily rising (`reaching 99°C vs design 210°C at high fire`), indicating severe loss of waterside heat transfer efficiency.
root_cause: Lack of daily bottom blowdown execution by plant operators allowed suspended solids (`40 ppm ppm TDS`) and sludge to bake onto hot tubesheet surfaces.
action_taken: Circulated inhibited sulfamic acid descaling solution (`Spec-438`) through boiler waterside loop for `30343` hours, neutralized and flushed until pH neutral, inspected tubes (`scale completely cleared`), and renewed handhole gaskets.
parts_used: Water Softener Cation Resin (5 Bags), Boiler Handhole Gaskets (Top & Bottom Set), Internal Scale Treatment Chemical (15 Gal)

symptom_description: Fuel consumption increased by `51%%` per ton of steam generated (`severe` efficiency drop). Low water cutoff float chamber fouled with sludge accumulation.
root_cause: Lack of daily bottom blowdown execution by plant operators allowed suspended solids (`337 ppm ppm TDS`) and sludge to bake onto hot tubesheet surfaces.
action_taken: Circulated inhibited sulfamic acid descaling solution (`Spec-201`) through boiler waterside loop for `15114` hours, neutralized and flushed until pH neutral, inspected tubes (`scale completely cleared`), and renewed handhole gaskets.
parts_used: Water Softener Cation Resin (5 Bags), Boiler Handhole Gaskets (Top & Bottom Set), Internal Scale Treatment Chemical (15 Gal)

symptom_description: Annual boiler safety valve pop test failed: valve stuck closed during lever lifting test (`331 in-lbs` pull) or opened `14.0 PSI` above stamped ASME set pressure.
root_cause: Normal mechanical seat wear and wire-drawing erosion (`0.013 inch` groove) across sealing faces from prolonged minor steam weeping.
action_taken: Installed new factory-calibrated and sealed safety relief valve (`P/N 1973-A`), re-supported discharge vent pipe to ensure zero weight on valve body, and verified reseating tightness.
parts_used: Replacement ASME Safety Relief Valve, Flange Mounting Hardware

symptom_description: Feedwater pump struggling to maintain level (`220 Amps` high draw). Feedwater piping pressure unusually high (`38 PSI`).
root_cause: Under-dosing of internal boiler scale treatment chemical (`phosphate/polymer dispersant`) over past `10 months` due to chemical pump air-lock.
action_taken: Mechanically scraped tubesheet and lower drum surfaces through handholes, flushed heavy scale debris (`7.7 lbs`) from bottom header, rebuilt automatic surface blowdown controller (`P/N 3182-A`), and replaced water softener resin.
parts_used: Low-Water Cutoff Float Bowl Rebuild Kit, Manway Spiral Wound Gasket, Phosphate Scale Inhibitor (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Boiler stack temperature steadily rising (`reaching 104°C vs design 210°C at high fire`), indicating severe loss of waterside heat transfer efficiency.
root_cause: Lack of daily bottom blowdown execution by plant operators allowed suspended solids (`39 ppm ppm TDS`) and sludge to bake onto hot tubesheet surfaces.
action_taken: Circulated inhibited sulfamic acid descaling solution (`Spec-956`) through boiler waterside loop for `21222` hours, neutralized and flushed until pH neutral, inspected tubes (`scale completely cleared`), and renewed handhole gaskets.
parts_used: Water Softener Cation Resin (5 Bags), Boiler Handhole Gaskets (Top & Bottom Set), Internal Scale Treatment Chemical (15 Gal)

symptom_description: Conductivity of boiler water unexpectedly low (`0.09 Mega-ohms uS/cm`) despite high chemical feed, indicating massive dilution from makeup water.
root_cause: Soot blower steam impingement (`31 PSI`) eroded the tube wall thickness over `10` years of operation.
action_taken: Replaced steam-eroded tubes (`Spec-467`), recalibrated soot blower steam pressure regulator (`37 PSI`), and verified impingement angles.
parts_used: Heavy Wall Boiler Tubes, Soot Blower Valve Rebuild Kit, Gasket Sheet

symptom_description: Fuel consumption increased by `19%%` per ton of steam generated (`concerning` efficiency drop). Low water cutoff float chamber fouled with sludge accumulation.
root_cause: Failure of the automatic surface blowdown controller (probe coated with `0.07 inch` scale) allowed TDS to climb to `19 ppm ppm`.
action_taken: Replaced coated conductivity probe (`Spec-648`), recalibrated auto-blowdown valve (`23 Hz` cycles/hr), and mechanically punched all firetubes (`6.5 ft` reach).
parts_used: Conductivity Probe, Blowdown Valve Actuator, Tube Punching Brushes (Set of 3)
